weekly_summary: This week, users expressed frustration with the trading experience on Groww, citing issues with limit orders being executed as market orders and stop losses hitting instantly. App performance issues also led to user dissatisfaction, with some unable to continue using the app. However, some users praised the app for being good for investment. The top themes of poor trading experience, app performance issues, and app user experience accounted for a significant portion of the reviews.
action_ideas: Improve the trading experience by ensuring limit orders are executed correctly
Optimize app performance to prevent issues and improve user satisfaction
Enhance the overall user experience by addressing user feedback and concerns
